cv

General Information

Full Name Sasanka Shamal Weerasooriya
Date of Birth 14th September 1998
Languages English, Sinhala

Education

  • 2019 - now
    BSc. Computer Engineering
    Faculty of Engineering, University of Peradeniya, Sri Lanka
    • GPA - 3.76/4.0
  • 2004 - 2017
    Primary and Secondary Education
    St. Anthony's College, Kandy, Sri Lanka
    • G.C.E. A/L (Physical Science)
      • Combined Mathematics (A), Physics (A), Chemistry (B)
      • Z-Score - 1.9365
      • Distric Rank (Kandy, Sri Lanka) - 44/2784
      • Country Rank - 635/32075

Experience

  • 2021 - now
    Teaching Assistant in Department of Computer Engineering
    Faculty of Engineering, University of Peradeniya, Sri Lanka
    • Courses Assisted
      • CO253 (Introduction to Programming and networking for Electrical Engineering)
      • CO321 (Introduction to Embedded Systems)
      • CO323 (Computer Networks - II)
  • 2020 - now
    Web Developer for Embedded Systems and Computer Architecture Laboratory
    Department of Computer Engineering, Faculty of Engineering, University of Peradeniya, Sri Lanka
  • 2021 - now
    Freelance software developer and document editor
    Fiverr (Checkout my profile here)

Projects

  • 2021-now
    Remote Keyboard Tutoring System | Group Project
    • A web-based system to interactively learn, play or teach piano in combination with the aid of a hardware unit and a web application.
    • Technologies - React JS, Node JS, Express, Flutter, Embedded Systems, AWS
    • Contribution
      • UI/UX design for an e-learning platform specific to keyboard/piano learners/tutors
      • Front development through React JS
      • Back end and API development through Node JS and Express
      • Hosting and deployment of the web application through AWS
  • 2021-now
    Analysis Tool for Industrial Images | Group Project
    • An analysis tool for increasing the performance of an injection mold maintenance device which uses image processing techniques to identify stuck plastic particles on molds.
    • Technologies - React JS, Node JS, Express, Python
    • Contribution
      • UI/UX design for a dashboard to display the analysis results
      • API development through Node JS and Express
      • Image processing and analysis through Python
      • Hosting and deployment of the web application through Azure
  • 2021
    FPGA Processor Customization for CRC
    • Using custom instructions to the existing MIPS ISA of the NiosII processor of Altera Cyclone IV FPGA board, for performing the modulo-2 division, to enhance operation of CRC algorithm.
    • Technologies - FPGA Development Board Altera CycloneIV, Quartus II, Nios II Software Build Tools, C, Verilog
    • Techniques
      • Custom instructions to the existing MIPS ISA of the NiosII processor of Altera Cyclone IV FPGA board
      • Modulo-2 division
      • CRC algorithm
  • 2020
    8-bit single cycle processor | Group Project
    • An 8-bit single cycle CPU with associated memory hierarchy. The processor includes an ALU, register file, control logic, forwarding unit, data memory, data cache, instruction memory and instruction cache.
    • Technologies - Verilog-HDL
    • Techniques
      • RISC architecture
      • Caching

Technical Skills

  • Programming Languages (Fluent)
    • C, Java, Python, JavaScript, MATLAB
  • Programming Languages (Familiar)
    • C++, Verilog HDL, PHP
  • Web Development
    • React JS, Node JS, Express, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap
  • Database Management
    • MySQL, MongoDB
  • PCB Design
    • Proteus
  • Version Control
    • Git, GitHub
  • Computer-Aided Design
    • AutoCAD, SolidWorks

  • 2021
    Mini Hackathon - ICDS
    • Data Science Hackathon organized by University of Colombo
    • 5th Place(Out of 100+ teams)
  • 2020
    ACES Coders
    • Overnight inter-university coding competition organized by University of Peradeniya
    • 14th Place(out of 100+ teams)
  • 2022
    Hacktitude 2022
    • Overnight coding competition organized by 99x
    • 14th Place(out of 200+ teams)
  • 2017
    Special award at St. Anthony’s College, Kandy, Sri Lanka for Outstanding performance in G.C.E A/L with a z- score of 1.9365

Extra Curricular Activities and Achievements

  • 2013
    Plate champions at all nation, under 16, inter-school rugby tournament division-1
    • Organized by Sri Lanka Schools Rugby Association
  • 2013
    Special awards (school colours) for rugby at st. Anthony’s College, Kandy, Sri Lanka
  • 2012
    Pre-quarter finalists at all nation, under 15, inter-school cricket championship
    • Organized by Sri Lanka Schools Cricket Association
  • 2019
    4th place at inter-university rugby championship, Sri Lanka
  • 2019
    University sports colours for ruby at University of Peradeniya, Sri Lanka

  • Industrial Computer Networks and Systems Engineering
  • Machine Learning
  • Web and Mobile Application Development
  • Industrial Automation
